channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Yamal, Williams to be available for Spain’s opening World Cup match
item.description: Star forward Yamal expected to be ready after suffering a groin injury that kept him out of a pretournament friendly.

item.title: Satellite images show destruction of the US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: From Iranian naval ports to US military bases across the Gulf, Al Jazeera shows 15 sites before and after the attacks.

item.title: Debris reported in Jordan after Iranian missiles aimed at Israel intercepte
item.description: Missiles believed fired from Iran toward Israel were seen over Jordan, with one reportedly intercepted.

item.title: Peru’s Sanchez visits jailed ex-president as votes are counted
item.description: Peruvian presidential candidate Roberto Sanchez visited jailed former president Pedro Castillo.

item.title: How Mexican cartels turned South African farms into meth production hubs
item.description: Raids on South African farms have uncovered meth labs linked to Mexican networks, signalling a new cartel phase.

item.title: Oppenheimer: Trump holds the reins on Netanyahu’s escalation options
item.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu has incentives to escalate tensions with Iran but is constrained by US President Trump.

item.title: Powerful earthquake hits Philippines, triggering tsunami alerts across Asia
item.description: Officials in Indonesia, the Philippines, and Japan warn of possible tsunami waves after an earthquake off Mindanao.

item.title: Iran and Israel trade threats after Tehran launches missiles
item.description: Iran and Israel exchanged threats after Tehran launched missiles towards Israel in response to Israeli strikes on Beirut

item.title: Iran war live: Iranians fire missiles at Israel after strikes on Tehran
item.description: Escalation comes after Israel attacked Lebanon's capital, Beirut, killing at least two people and wounding 20.

item.title: North Korea’s Kim Jong Un inspects munitions at weapons factory
item.description: North Korea has released photos of Kim Jong Un inspecting huge munitions at a weapons factory

item.title: Iran’s attack on Israel aims to restore deterrence but avoid return to war
item.description: Iran's attack on Israel aims to restore deterrence but avoid return to war.

item.title: Videos show missiles launched from Iran into Israel
item.description: Iranian media has released video showing missiles being launched towards Israel.

item.title: Celebrations seen in Tehran as missiles fly overhead towards Israel
item.description: Iranian state TV broadcast scenes of celebration in Tehran as missiles flew overhead en route to Israel.

item.title: Iran fires missiles at Israel after Beirut attack ‘crossed all red lines’
item.description: Iran's IRGC says the barrage of missiles is 'a warning' to Israel amid its ongoing siege of Lebanon.

item.title: Iran fires missiles at Israel after it attacked Beirut
item.description: Videos show missiles over Israel as the Israeli military says Iran launched a new wave of attacks.

item.title: Iran losing patience with Israel and US over ceasefire violations
item.description: Iran’s patience has reached its limit with the continuous violations of the ‘ceasefire’.

item.title: Iranian World Cup excitement dulled by war and economic crisis
item.description: Iranian World Cup excitement dulled by war and economic crisis.

item.title: Italy recovers 10 bodies as boat with nearly 60 on board capsizes off Malta
item.description: At least 990 refugees and migrants have died this year while attempting the perilous journey across the Mediterranean.

item.title: Hezbollah MP: Resistance defends Lebanon where the state failed
item.description: Ibrahim Moussawi says Hezbollah stepped in after diplomacy and the Lebanese state failed.

item.title: Lawsuit seeks to stop Trump’s planned White House UFC match
item.description: Legal challenge claims US president did not seek proper approval for fighting event to be held on his 80th birthday.

item.title: Alexander Zverev wins French Open to claim first Grand Slam title
item.description: Zverev's five-set defeat of Flavio Cobolli makes him the first German man to win a Slam since Boris Becker 30 years ago.

item.title: Denmark’s Christian Eriksen collapses on football pitch during friendly
item.description: The football player has a special heart-starting device implanted since he collapsed during a match in 2021.

item.title: Bolivia’s legislature passes law allowing use of troops against protesters
item.description: New law grants president power to use military to clear roadblocks set up amid weeks of antigovernment demonstrations.

item.title: Nigerian forces rescue 360 captives from Boko Haram
item.description: Nigerian forces rescued 360 captives, including women and children from a Boko Haram mountain hideout in Borno State.

item.title: Trump says will not unfreeze Iranian assets before ceasefire deal reached
item.description: Iranian officials have indicated the release of funds would build 'trust' needed to reach lasting deal ending war.
